ddls:
CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "id" TEXT /* ID of the report template */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report template (e.g., HTML) */,
  "sections" INTEGER /* Whether the report template has sections */,
  "themes" INTEGER /* Whether the report template has themes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report template */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the report template is active */,
  "author" TEXT /* User who created or last updated the report template */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the report template */,
  "default_theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default theme associated with the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_templates_default_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("default_theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report template associated with the theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the theme */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the theme is active */,
  "author" TEXT /* User who created or last updated the theme */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id")
)
